items.reasoning: Sustain through Quill Spray + Decay chip damage; this lane grinds HP constantly.
Undying Decay steals 4 STR per cast -- salve recovers after falling below 50% HP.
2x branches + circlet build into Wraith Band for lane stat efficiency.
+3 agi for last-hit damage; Void base damage is low at level 1.
510g for +5 agi/str/int; doubles stats at 25 min. Lane sustain against Decay.
STR treads for surviving Tombstone fights; AGI for farming after lane.
Bristle Quill Spray + Undying Decay spam = 5+ wand charges per engagement.
Chain Lightning accelerates farm and clears Tombstone zombies instantly.
Chronosphere is wasted if Decay debuff + Quill stacks kill you during it. BKB ensures you survive your own ult.
Upgrade from Maelstrom; Static Charge punishes Bristle's melee attack speed. +70 AS for Chronosphere DPS.
200% lifesteal active inside Chronosphere = full HP recovery. Counters sustained damage over time.
35% evasion + 35 agi. Bristleback has no MKB in typical builds; pure scaling.
Breaks Bristleback passive -- removes 40% damage reduction. Essential if Bristle becomes unkillable.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Accept a slow lane against Bristle + Undying's sustained pressure. Farm with Time Walk recovery and rush Maelstrom for jungle speed. Once Chronosphere + BKB online, trap priority targets and burst them before Bristle stacks become lethal.
